ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office responsible for the transaction */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan account */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Accrual, Repayment, Disbursement) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "principal" REAL /* Principal amount involved in the transaction */,
  "interest" REAL /* Interest amount involved in the transaction */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "penalties" REAL /* Penalties applied to the transaction */,
  "loan_balance" REAL /* Remaining loan balance after the transaction */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the transaction */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  "external_reference" TEXT /* External reference for the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_accounts ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for inquiries related to the office */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the office */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the office opened */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the office */,
  "total_loans_managed" INTEGER /* Total number of loans managed by the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_accounts" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who holds the loan */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office managing the loan */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., Personal, Mortgage, Auto) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Initial amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate applicable on the loan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the loan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the loan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., Active, Closed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the loan account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan account was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the loan account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan account was last updated */,
  "next_payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment due */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment */,
  "late_payment_count" INTEGER /* Count of late payments */,
  "total_fees_paid" REAL /* Total fees paid on the loan */,
  "total_penalties_paid" REAL /* Total penalties paid on the loan */,
  "external_loan_reference" TEXT /* External reference for the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_accounts_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the customer record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the customer record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "total_loans" INTEGER /* Total number of loans the customer has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Accrual, Repayment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the transaction type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction type was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the transaction type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan associated with the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., late fee, service fee) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the fee */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the fee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the fee */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_accounts ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan associated with the penalty */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Amount of the penalty */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the penalty */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the penalty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the penalty was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the penalty */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the penalty was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_accounts ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, admin) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the log entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
